'''√v-w-k''' ('''kavawak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quay|quay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quay|quay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavawak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivawak || jivawak || shivawak || kivawak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvawak || jujuvawak || shushuvawak || kukuvawak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvawak || juvawak || shuvawak || kuvawak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvawak || juvawak || shuvawak || kuvawak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevawak || jevawak || shevawak || kevawak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovawak || jojovawak || shoshovawak || kokovawak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovawak || jovawak || shovawak || kovawak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovawak || jovawak || shovawak || kovawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vawak || vawak || vawak || vawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vawak || vawak || vawak || vawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vawak || vawak || vawak || vawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vawak || vawak || vawak || vawak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævawak || jævawak || shævawak || kævawak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavawak || jajavawak || shashavawak || kakavawak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavawak || javawak || shavawak || kavawak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavawak || javawak || shavawak || kavawak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavawak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavawak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavawak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavawaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavawaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavawaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavawakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavawaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavawakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavawakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavawaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavawakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavawakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavawaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavawakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavawaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavawaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavawaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavawakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavawaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavawakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavawakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavawaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavawakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavawakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavawaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavawakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavawaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavawaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavawaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavawaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavawaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavawaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavawaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavawaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavawaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavawakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavawaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavawakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavawakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavawaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavawakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavawakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavawaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavawakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavawakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavawaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavawakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavawakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavawaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavawakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavawakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavawaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavawakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavawakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavawaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavawakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavawakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavawaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavawakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavawakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavawaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavawakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
